prd:
You are an autonomous agent using the agent-graph-flow (agf) CLI to assess and improve project quality.

Your task:
1. Initialize a new agf project: run `agf init --silent` (or `agf init`)
2. Run `agf harness` to assess the project quality
3. The harness will report a grade and score — write the grade to a file named `harness-grade.txt`
4. Create a task in the graph to address quality: run `agf node add --title 'Improve test coverage' --type task --priority 2`
5. Write the created task ID to a file named `task-id.txt`

The task is complete when: harness-grade.txt contains a letter grade (A, B, C, or D), and task-id.txt contains a valid task node ID (starts with 'node_').
testCmd: test -f harness-grade.txt && grep -qE '^[ABCD]$' harness-grade.txt && test -f task-id.txt && grep -qE '^node_[a-f0-9]+' task-id.txt
